task_completion.description: Verify that three specific tracks have been created and named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the track headers or mixer panel in the DAW. There should be exactly three tracks named 'Tactile Bass', 'Overhead Ambience', and 'Spot FX'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the raw audio files have been imported into their respective tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for audio regions (waveforms) on the three tracks in the timeline. The regions should correspond to the raw files (e.g., rumble on Tactile Bass, ambience on Overhead Ambience, fx on Spot FX).

task_completion.description: Verify that all audio regions start at 0:00.000 and are trimmed to exactly 20.000 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the timeline ruler. The left edge of all audio regions must align perfectly with the 0 mark, and the right edge must align perfectly with the 20-second mark.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Range Marker named 'Exhibit_Loop' exists from 0 to 20 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the marker/range ruler at the top of the timeline. There should be a range or loop marker labeled 'Exhibit_Loop' that spans exactly from 0:00.000 to 20:00.000.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Tactile Bass' gain is set to +3 dB and 'Spot FX' is muted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the track headers or mixer strips. The fader or gain value for 'Tactile Bass' should read +3.0 (or very close to it). The 'M' (Mute) button on the 'Spot FX' track must be highlighted or engaged.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final stereo mix was exported to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Audio/exhibit_final/exhibit_mix.wav', or a file manager/terminal window verifying that 'exhibit_mix.wav' exists in the 'exhibit_final' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) GUI to perform the mix.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a DAW interface (like Ardour) being actively used to arrange, mix, and export the audio, rather than terminal commands (like ffmpeg or sox) bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify that the exported file was generated by the DAW.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the DAW's export dialog, progress bar, or session export settings rather than a terminal window using 'touch' or 'cp' to fake the output file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not manually edit session files or create fake audio files using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors open modifying XML session files or creating dummy files named 'exhibit_mix.wav'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required tracks: 'Tactile Bass', 'Overhead Ambience', 'Spot FX'. Target length: 20 seconds (882000 samples). Target start position: 0:00.000. Tactile Bass gain: +3.0 dB. Spot FX track must be muted. Export path: /home/ga/Audio/exhibit_final/exhibit_mix.wav.
